summary: Comprehensive testing of Final Alignment Code Pack for Konekt Business OS. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages tested after fixing API path issues. Found and fixed API path prefix inconsistency - frontend was missing /api prefix for new routes.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - New frontend pages were missing /api prefix in API calls (e.g., /admin/setup/industries instead of /api/admin/setup/industries)

categories_tested.QA Routes: 2 tests - auth check, health-check with readiness score
categories_tested.Team Roles Routes: 3 tests - auth check, list roles, list staff users
categories_tested.Admin Setup Routes: 7 tests - industries CRUD, sources CRUD, payment terms
categories_tested.Creative Projects Routes: 3 tests - admin list, my projects, auth check
categories_tested.Affiliate Self-Service Routes: 2 tests - auth check, dashboard (404 for non-affiliate)

frontend_ui_tests.setup_page: PASS - Industries and Sources sections load correctly
frontend_ui_tests.launch_readiness_page: PASS - Readiness score 6/6, all checks OK
frontend_ui_tests.record_payment_page: PASS - Form elements and multi-allocation UI working
frontend_ui_tests.warehouse_transfers_page: PASS - Transfer form and history loading with data
frontend_ui_tests.stock_movements_page: PASS - Table showing movement history with filters

features_verified: QA Health Check API (/api/admin/qa/health-check) - Returns readiness score and data counts
Health Ready Endpoint (/api/health/ready) - Returns ready: true
Team Roles API (/api/admin/team-roles/roles) - Lists 6 staff roles
Team Roles Users API (/api/admin/team-roles/users) - Lists staff users
Setup Industries API (/api/admin/setup/industries) - Full CRUD working
Setup Sources API (/api/admin/setup/sources) - Full CRUD working
Creative Projects Admin API (/api/creative-projects/admin) - Lists all projects
Creative Projects My API (/api/creative-projects/my) - Lists user's projects
Creative Project Collaboration Comments API - Add and list comments
Creative Project Collaboration Revisions API - List revisions
Creative Project Collaboration Deliverables API - Add and list deliverables
Customer Statement API (/api/customer/statements/me) - Returns statement with summary
Affiliate Self-Service API (/api/affiliate-self/dashboard) - Returns 404 for non-affiliates
Stock Movements API (/api/admin/stock-movements) - Returns movement history
Warehouse Transfers API (/api/admin/warehouse-transfers) - Returns transfer history
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Frontend API path inconsistency - some pages were missing /api prefix causing 404 errors

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages loading correctly after fixes

test_data_created.industries: TEST_Industry_Manufacturing - created and deleted during test
test_data_created.sources: TEST_Source_LinkedIn - created and deleted during test

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - hook exists but not used

context_for_next_testing_agent: Final alignment code pack fully tested. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% test pass rate. Fixed API path prefix issue in 9 frontend files - pages were calling /admin/... instead of /api/admin/... Backend routes include: qa_routes.py, health_routes.py, team_role_routes.py, admin_setup_routes.py, creative_project_routes.py, creative_project_collab_routes.py, customer_statement_routes.py, affiliate_self_service_routes.py. Stock reserve/deduct endpoints working. Launch readiness page shows 6/6 score.
